unresolved_issues: Formula-level review needed for compacted household/borrower marginal utility and Euler terms.
Entrepreneur capital Euler collateral-premium terms need source-level checking.
Wage-setting and retail interest-rate Calvo blocks are summarized generically and need equation-by-equation review.
Steady-state solution is summarized from Appendix 2; full sequential algebra remains deferred.
Runtime validation was intentionally not performed.
